# Dimitris Vatistas — Full Stack Developer & UI Designer
# Website: https://dvatistas.vercel.app/

## About
Full Stack Web Developer, Swift iOS App Developer, Android App Developer, and UI Designer creating modern websites, mobile apps, interactive prototypes, and clean digital products.

## Portfolio Apps
- Stays: A calm way to discover and book beautiful stays. (https://dvatistas.vercel.app/stays)
- Scoffly: Food, groceries, and restaurants in one friendly app. (https://dvatistas.vercel.app/scoffly)
- FitZone: Activity, sleep, and workouts in a clean daily dashboard. (https://dvatistas.vercel.app/fitzone)
- Route: Plan, price, and track rides with a clear map flow. (https://dvatistas.vercel.app/route)
- Mono: Organize your closet and discover outfits with AI. (https://dvatistas.vercel.app/mono)
- STRM: Discover movies and TV shows with a clean streaming experience. (https://dvatistas.vercel.app/strm)
- Vest: Track stocks, manage your portfolio, and discover new investments. (https://dvatistas.vercel.app/vest)
